examples: Don't be a meddlesome wench and poke your nose where it's no cause to go.
But now this meddlesome bedbug has inspired tenfold the terror.
FOR decades Turkey's meddlesome generals inspired fear and respect.
Barack Obama and the Democrat Party cannot fix meddlesome regulation with even more regulation.
Mr Erdogan's conciliatory message was also intended for the country's meddlesome generals, who despise him.
